per_criterion.rationale: Draft 1's trailer ('Last week I found myself deleting the line "we use AI in our process" from a gofreddy sales note. / It sounded current. It explained almost nothing.') is a counterintuitive moment with a specific entity, and the body delivers the promised reframing toward inspectable proof. Draft 2's trailer names OpenAI B2B Signals + a specific gofreddy habit shift and the body delivers a 5-question scorecard — no bait-and-switch. Cohort-level verdict 1.

The central thesis ('AI adoption is becoming a scoreboard') is non-obvious for founders/CMOs as a target audience. Slight haircut because the reframing is closer to operator common-sense once read.

per_criterion.rationale: Draft 1 closes on a debatable defensible claim ('AI adoption is becoming a scoreboard. The agency job is to make it useful before the buyer builds one without you.') that invites case-comparison from other agency operators or buyers. Draft 2's 5-question framework offers explicit empty-slot affordance — a reader can plausibly contribute question 6 or argue against one of the five. Reply-ladder ceiling sits at DH3–DH4 (case extension / methodological pushback), not DH0–DH2 reactions. No bolted-on CTA.

per_criterion.rationale: Cohort has 2 drafts spanning 2 distinct archetypes (story-led short_take + lesson-led thought_leader framework) — explicit per findings.md. That maps to the rubric's Score 3 band ('Some archetype variation — 2 distinct archetypes'). Pillar spread is constrained to a single pillar ('AI-native marketing'), which is the angle metadata's only pillar, so cross-pillar diversity is structurally unavailable here. Comparison and case-study archetypes are missing. Cohort feels narrower than a 4-archetype Score-5 spread but reads as intentional dual-format coverage, not a same-tone streak. 1/3/5 → 2/6/10 mapping → 6.

primary.notes: Both drafts pass local structural_gate + slop_check per their eval.json. Lived-work specifics restricted to allowlisted entities (gofreddy, autoresearch) per findings.md, and numeric anchors (11 marketing areas / 149 always-on lenses) are author-substrate consistent. OpenAI B2B Signals used only as public attribution. Source page fetch was blocked by Cloudflare per findings.md, so the post does not claim page details beyond title/URL — appropriate restraint. Main cohort weakness is archetype/pillar narrowness (2 archetypes, 1 pillar) — Score-3 band on LI-6, capped by the angle's single-pillar metadata.
